title: TarminaRX's Lucky Clover
description: Find rare four-leaf clovers, stack up your luck, and watch your loot tables smile back. Boost fishing and chest rewards, trade with master clerics, and tune every multiplier to make fortune favor your adventures.
body:
# TarminaRX's Lucky Clover

Discover the magic of luck with four-leaf clovers! This mod brings a touch of fortune to your Minecraft adventures by introducing lucky four-leaf clovers that enhance your luck attribute and improve your loot-finding experience.

## Features

### 🍀 Four-Leaf Clover Item

Find these rare lucky charms in loot chests throughout your world! Each clover you carry increases your luck, making your adventures more rewarding.

### 🎲 Dynamic Luck System

- **Inventory-Based Luck**: The more clovers you carry, the luckier you get!
- **Configurable Multipliers**: Customize how much luck each clover provides
- **Affects All Luck Mechanics**: Fishing, mob drops, and loot chest contents all benefit from your increased luck

![Lucky Clover Effect Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdc01b24989efe19aeefb70e8f1d9937df787e68.png)

### 📦 Loot Table Integration

Four-leaf clovers naturally spawn in various loot containers:
- Village chests
- Barrels
- Dungeon loot
- And more!

The more clovers you already have, the better your chances of finding more (luck multiplier applies to clover spawns too)!

![Lucky Clover Chest Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3f301304738ae253b988be1f7d72f194ebd1027.png)

### 🤝 Villager Trading

Master Clerics have discovered the secret of four-leaf clovers and are willing to trade them for emeralds (or any configured item).

![Lucky Clover Villager Trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67c8f9736c89b567511f478e055620da65daf913.png)

## ⚙️ Configuration

TarminaRX's Lucky Clover is highly configurable! After your first launch, find the config file at `config/trxluckyclover-common.toml`.

### Trade Configuration
```toml
enableCloverTrade = true           # Enable/disable cleric trades
tradeItem = "minecraft:emerald"    # Item required for trade
tradeItemCount = 50                # Number of items needed
```

### Luck Settings
```toml
luckMultiplier = 1.0              # Luck bonus per clover (general effects)
lootLuckMultiplier = 0.01         # Luck bonus for finding more clovers
```

### Loot Settings
```toml
enableLootTableDrops = true       # Enable clovers in loot chests
cloverLootChance = 0.1            # Base spawn chance (0.0 to 1.0)
maxCloverInLoot = 1               # Max clovers per chest
```

## 🐛 Bug Reports & Suggestions

Found a bug or have a feature suggestion? Please report it on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/TarminaRX/luck-clover-mod/issues).


## 🏆 Credits

- [KazekiPixels](https://mcmodels.net/vendors/195/kazekipixels) - For the four-leaf clover texture.
- [JrDemiurge](https://modrinth.com/user/JrDemiurge) - for the original mod idea.

---

**May the luck of the four-leaf clover be with you!** 🍀
